nodes.speaker: Mayor Trill
nodes.text: You came down from the uplands when we rang the sea bell. Coral Harbor still stands, but the rune stones are failing beyond our walls.

nodes.speaker: Mayor Trill
nodes.text: I gathered you here because you're our best chance. Find Ember, Tide, Gale, and Stone, and restore them before Gaia goes dark.
Then breathe the harbor air while you can. The world will ask more of you soon.
